summary: Frontend testing of 3 new features completed - 11/12 tests PASS. Dashboard search bar, profile avatar, and treatment timeline all working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: X button (clear search) not clickable via Playwright position/JS click. TouchableOpacity may have z-index or event handling issue in React Native Web. Functionality works when clearing via keyboard.
ui_bugs.workaround: User can clear search by selecting text and pressing backspace, or navigating away

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate X button click handling in React Native Web - may need larger touch target or different event handling
critical_code_review_comments: Search bar with correct placeholder renders properly
Search filters client-side on patient_name and registration_number
Profile avatar shows correct initials (DG for Dr. Gaurav Pandey)
Avatar click navigates to profile page
Treatment timeline shows all 5 phases correctly
Timeline correctly differentiates completed (green checkmarks), active (blue dot), and pending (gray) states
Treatment Complete banner displays for completed procedures
Export PDF button now renders correctly (fixed from iteration_3)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Stage2 Test Patient (completed), Phase2 Test (pending_phase1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features working. Only minor issue is X button clickability in Playwright tests (not a user-facing bug). Export PDF button is now fixed and visible.

dashboard_search_bar.renders_with_placeholder: PASS - 'Search patients by name or reg. number...' visible
dashboard_search_bar.search_results_show_details: PASS - Shows patient name, reg number, student name, site, status badge
dashboard_search_bar.click_result_navigates: PASS - Clicking 'Stage2 Test Patient' navigates to /procedures/69a06378781deba32c41edb7
dashboard_search_bar.clear_search_shows_stats: PASS - Stats/calendar visible after clearing search (via keyboard)

dashboard_profile_avatar.shows_initials: PASS - Avatar shows 'DG' for Dr. Gaurav Pandey
dashboard_profile_avatar.welcome_text: PASS - 'Welcome back,' and user name displayed

procedure_detail_timeline.shows_5_steps: PASS - Phase 1, Phase 2, Stage 2 Surgical, Stage 2 Prosthetic, Complete
procedure_detail_timeline.completed_all_green_checkmarks: PASS - All 5 steps show green checkmarks with timestamps for completed procedure
procedure_detail_timeline.pending_phase1_blue_dot: PASS - Phase 1 shows blue outline with blue dot (active), rest are gray
procedure_detail_timeline.treatment_complete_banner: PASS - Green banner with trophy icon and 'Treatment Complete' text
